scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: echo 'Installing dependencies...' && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && echo 'Building client...' && npm run build --prefix client && echo 'Build complete - frontend is in server/public'
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
